name: @jeldon/aeo-audit
description: Domain-agnostic answer-engine citation-presence audit. Runs a query set against pluggable engines (Perplexity / Anthropic web_search / Google AIO / OpenAI), records per-engine citation rank + brand mentions, and aggregates snapshots into engine stats, wins/drops, trend, and deterministic action items. Ported from Body of Health aeo-audit.mjs + command/aeo.ts.
